benefits.description: Dropped from 245 to 225 lbs (20 lbs) in approximately 5-6 weeks, then additional 5 lbs after carb refeeding

side_effects.description: Felt terrible during weeks 5-7, body composition plateau with no weight loss. Caused by glycogen depletion from insufficient carbohydrate intake.

protocol_notes: User learned importance of adequate carbohydrate intake, electrolytes, and sodium for sustained weight loss. Initial 20 lbs in 4 weeks, then plateau and refeeding recovery.
